steps.title: Find the collection size
steps.content:
Green items are $20\%$ of the collection, and there are $60$ green items. Let $T$ be the total number of items:
$$
0.20T=60
$$
$$
T=300
$$

steps.title: Find the blue items
steps.content: Blue items are $35\%$ of the collection, so $$ 0.35\cdot 300=105 $$ The answer is D.
